props.title: Custom Styling Overrides
props.description: A docs example that themes panel chrome, edge strokes, built-in nodes, and a custom CalloutNode with CSS variables and stable hooks.

props.label: Theme wrapper mounts
props.description: A wrapper component scopes CSS variables and selector overrides around FlaierDemo.

props.label: Panel + custom node theme
props.body: The wrapper updates Flaier color tokens, fullscreen toggle chrome, edge accents, and the custom CalloutNode accent palette without changing renderer code.

props.label: Scoped CSS override
props.story: Stable hooks like .flaier[data-mode] and .fn-node[data-node-type] let the docs app restyle the embed without forking component templates.

props.label: Theme result
props.description: Built-in nodes can be re-skinned with the same token and data-attribute strategy.

props.label: Styling stays isolated
props.body: The overrides are scoped to one wrapper component, so the rest of the docs site still uses the default Flaier theme.

props.label: Styling API reference
props.description: See the Styling section for the exported hooks and panel tokens.
